article.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

headline: Trump Crypto Backs $1M UFC Bonuses with Stablecoins

article.title: Trump crypto company's USD1 stablecoins backing UFC event bonuses
article.summary: A spokesperson for the Democratic National Committee decried the move as “an opportunity to use the power of the presidency to make [Trump] and his family even richer.”

headline: Gold Steady as Hormuz Reopening Looms This Week

article.title: Gold Holds Gain as Trump Touts Reopening of Hormuz This Week
article.summary: Gold held a gain after US President Donald Trump said the Strait of Hormuz could reopen on Friday, likely easing an energy and inflation shock that has roiled global markets.

article.title: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
article.summary: A federal judge handed Elon Musk his second defeat against OpenAI after finding xAI failed to show OpenAI improperly obtained confidential info.
